summary: Closed the remaining round-4 review-cycle issues by making shared contract validation fully fail-closed, reconciling canonical unresolved evidence after verdict overrides, converting BoardBlockedError into a typed blocked result inside executeBoard, and requiring compliance-map evidence in the ad-hoc runner.
highlights: Runtime review parsing now depends on the loaded governed contract instead of local defaults.
review.json, run-postmortem.json, and resume-package consumers now see canonical unresolved evidence after leader overrides.
The ad-hoc review loop now requires compliance-map evidence before follow-up rounds.
